summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nexora Club website. All P0 features working: Login flow, Dashboard with user profile and registered events, Logo in navbar, HackerRank/LeetCode quick links, Registration via Join Us page, Protected routes redirect to login.

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 when no auth header provided - acceptable behavior

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Login/Logout flow properly updates navbar state
Protected routes correctly redirect to login
API integration working correctly with JWT auth
seed_data_creation: Test user already existed, no seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features implemented and tested: Login, Dashboard, Navbar with logo and auth state, Resources page with HackerRank/LeetCode links, Registration via Join Us, Protected routes. Backend APIs all working. Test user credentials: testuser123@test.com / testpass123

features_tested.login_flow: PASS - User can login with email/password, redirects to dashboard
features_tested.dashboard: PASS - Shows user profile info (name, email, phone, branch, year, interest area) and registered events (empty state shown correctly)
features_tested.navbar_logo: PASS - Logo displayed in navbar with brand text
features_tested.navbar_auth_state: PASS - Shows Login button when logged out, shows Dashboard and Logout when logged in
features_tested.resources_quick_links: PASS - HackerRank, LeetCode, CodeChef, GeeksforGeeks, Unstop, HackerEarth links all present
features_tested.registration_flow: PASS - Join Us page has all required fields (name, email, phone, branch, year, interest area, password)
features_tested.protected_routes: PASS - Dashboard redirects to login when not authenticated
features_tested.logout_flow: PASS - Logout clears token and redirects to home, navbar updates to show Login
